tool.name: Synthesia
tool.shortDescription: AI video platform for business training and presentations with realistic avatars
tool.description: Synthesia turns prompts, scripts, documents, or slides into presenter-led videos using realistic AI avatars. It's designed for business use cases like training, onboarding, product explainers, and internal communications. Video Agents allow interactive, conversational videos.
features: AI Playground (free Veo 3 and Sora 2 access)
pros: Strong for business training and onboarding
cons: Higher price point for business use
tool.bestFor: Employee training, onboarding, product explainers, internal communications, multilingual content, and interactive role-play learning

relatedTools.name: Veo 3.2
relatedTools.shortDescription: Google's cinematic AI video generator with realistic lighting and motion
relatedTools.description: Veo 3.2 creates short, cinematic video clips from text prompts or images. It excels at realistic lighting, smooth camera movement, and synchronized sound, making it ideal for dramatic moments, trailers, branded visuals, and mood-driven scenes.
cons: Not ideal for long, dialogue-heavy content
relatedTools.bestFor: Product ads, brand spots, social media teasers, concept visuals, mood pieces, and high-impact cinematic shots

relatedTools.name: Sora 2
relatedTools.shortDescription: OpenAI's narrative-focused AI video generator with dialogue and emotional coherence
relatedTools.description: Sora 2 is OpenAI's AI video generator, built for cinematic, story-driven clips with dialogue and emotional coherence. It's integrated into ChatGPT Plus and designed for narrative video creation.
cons: Limited generations per month on Plus
relatedTools.bestFor: Narrative storytelling, short films, trailers, emotional scenes, and story-driven content

relatedTools.name: Grok
relatedTools.shortDescription: X's AI assistant focused on real-time topics, fact-checking, and uncensored generation
relatedTools.description: Grok is X's AI assistant, tightly integrated into the platform. It's widely used for fact-checking posts, participating in debates, and generating memes and uncensored images. Features like 'Think' and 'Deep Search' improve response quality. Grok Imagine extends into fast AI video generation for rapid visual ideas.
pros: Fast and capable for real-time topics
Good for trending topics and debates
cons: Requires X Premium or Premium+ subscription
Constant AI tagging on X can disrupt conversation flow
relatedTools.bestFor: Real-time fact-checking, debate, meme creation, uncensored image/video generation, and rapid visual experiments
